"use strict";
/**
 * StateMachine 模块公共 API 出口
 *
 * 使用方式：
 *   import { StateMachine, StateBase } from "../Framework/StateMachine";
 *   import type { IStateMachine, IStateBase, TransitionGuard } from "../Framework/StateMachine";
 *
 * 或通过 Framework 统一入口：
 *   import { StateMachine, StateBase } from "../Framework";
 */

exports.StateBase = exports.StateMachine = void 0;
var StateMachine_1 = require("./StateMachine");
Object.defineProperty(exports, "StateMachine", { enumerable: true, get: function () { return StateMachine_1.StateMachine; } });
var StateBase_1 = require("./StateBase");
Object.defineProperty(exports, "StateBase", { enumerable: true, get: function () { return StateBase_1.StateBase; } });
